title: Converting Standard Templates to Managed Templates and Automations
excerpt: I know Managed Templates are still in Beta but I think it would be a great addition to be able to convert Standard Templates into Managed Templates instead of having to duplicate/create a board from a Standard Template a…

posts.author: epizzoni (Liz Pizzonia)
posts.cookedHtml:
I know Managed Templates are still in Beta but I think it would be a great addition to be able to convert Standard Templates into Managed Templates instead of having to duplicate/create a board from a Standard Template and then making that new board a Managed Template. Plus, now any existing boards creating from the Standard Template will not be linked to the Managed Template. This would be super useful for those with Workspaces already built out.

Please vote!! Thanks!
